title: dryopteris abrupta
intro: Dryopteris abrupta, also known as the Spiny Wood Fern, is a type of fern native to North America, characterized by its delicate fronds with spiny leaflets. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Dryopteris abrupta include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the fronds in hot water or extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent.
